why: recurs across Hg1223, BST, and FeSe
recurs across multiple bilayer nickelate thin-film papers
changes transport quality and superconducting signatures at ambient pressure

weak_knobs.why: important for stability and quality, but not yet a route-generating knob by itself
effect remains entangled with strain and annealing in the carried set

rationale: The carried evidence supports two knob families strongly enough to use in descriptor and route ranking: pressure quench, and strain plus oxygen control.
